test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with all fields (name, bio, born_year) returns 201 and correct response.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_optional_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with only required field (name) returns 201.

test_cases.name: create_author_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with a duplicate name returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_author_empty_name
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with an empty name returns 422 Unprocessable Entity.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an existing author returns 200 and correct author data.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving a non-existent author returns 404 Not Found.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an author with If-None-Match header matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with valid data returns 200 and updated author data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with If-Match header not matching ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author without associated books returns 204 No Content.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with associated books returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with all required fields returns 201 and correct book data.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with an ISBN of invalid length returns 422 Unprocessable Entity.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving an existing book returns 200 and correct book data.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating a book with valid data returns 200 and updated book data.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify updating a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify soft-deleting an existing book returns 204 No Content.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify restoring a soft-deleted book returns 200 and correct book data.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify restoring a book that is not soft-deleted returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount to a book published more than 1 year ago returns 200 and correct discounted price.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount exceeding the rate limit returns 429 Too Many Requests.

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock with a valid quantity returns 200 and updated book data.

test_cases.name: update_stock_resulting_in_negative
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock resulting in a negative value returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a valid cover image (JPEG/PNG under 2MB) returns 200 and correct response.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a file of unsupported type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type.

test_cases.name: upload_file_exceeding_size_limit
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a file exceeding 2MB size limit returns 413 Content Too Large.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify creating a review for an existing book returns 201 and correct review data.
